Business modules

All data stays on this device.

Reports

Cross-module rollups computed from your saved data. Tap a card to expand.

Settings Hub

One place for people, organisation, roles, data & cross-module sync.

📱 Display mode

How this device shows the app. Saved on this device — your store tablet and a phone can each keep their own.

👥 Common Employee Master

One verified staff list. Syncs into Payroll & Leave. Provides name suggestions for Grooming, Service and Cash entries.

Edit existing entries or import detected names from saved module data. Sync is safe — it won't delete attendance or leave records.

📋 Master list

Edit, deactivate or archive. Archived records remain for traceability.

🏛️ Organisation master

Single source of truth for firms & branches. Feeds Payroll letterheads, Tax firm master and report headers. Published to modules via the integration bus.

Edit and Save, then tap Publish to modules. Existing module data is never overwritten — only blank defaults are seeded.

🏢 Firms

🏬 Branches / stores

🗂️ Shared masters

One source of truth for every module (Phase 1). Employees live under People, firms/branches under Organisation. Manage brands, vendors and customers here. From Phase 2, modules read these directly so you add each item only once.

🏷️ Brands / products

🧾 Vendors / payees

👤 Customers

🔗 Cross-module sync

The integration event-bus links all modules. Every flow is an idempotent event — this is the live audit trail.

⚠️ Exceptions

Aggregated red-flags across every module (floor gate, open leads, unlocked stock, cash, vouchers, statutory).

⚙️ Integration rules

Tune cross-module behaviour. Applies immediately on save.

🧩 Module settings (detected)

Read-only view of each module's saved settings on this device. Deep edits stay inside each module.

🧾 Recent integration log

💾 Backup & restore

Manual JSON backup of all module data on this device. The app also writes a daily backup automatically inside this device's Documents/SaagarBCC-Backups/ folder.

🔄 Reset a single module

Removes saved data for one module only. A rollback snapshot is taken first.

🧹 Factory reset — clear ALL app data

Wipes every module's saved data on this device (stock, staff, payroll, expenses, service, leave, tax, employee master, settings) for a clean start. A backup is auto-exported first. This cannot be undone.

🗄️ Archive data older than 12 months

Exports day-records (stock, staff register, grooming) older than 12 months to a JSON file (Documents/SaagarBCC-Backups + a download), then removes them from this device to free space. Masters, payroll, tax and ledgers are kept. Keep the exported file safe — this cannot be undone.

🔒 Admin lock is on. Unlock to access destructive tools.

📊 Stored data summary

Everything saved by this app on this device.

🔒 Admin mode

Admin mode unlocks reset tools and Payroll / Tax modules. Locked by default.

Locked

🎭 Current role (this device)

Pick who is using this device. Each role only opens the modules enabled for it below. The Owner (admin mode) always sees everything.

🗝️ Module access by role

Turn each module on or off per role. Owner & Store Manager default to all. Changes apply the next time a module is opened.

🔑 Change admin PIN

Update the PIN used to unlock admin tools on this device.

🛡️ Protected modules

Require admin PIN to open Payroll and Tax modules from staff view.

🔒 Unlock admin to access these settings.

🩺 System diagnostics

Storage, module integrity, employee sync and startup errors.

💾 Storage engine

Live engine health & on-device footprint (read-only).

📜 Audit trail

Every write & admin action is logged on this device.

👤 Owner name

Used in the greeting and shared briefs.

🌟 What's new in V5

  • Bottom-nav layout, native-app feel
  • "Today's Brief" daily summary card
  • Reports tab with cross-module rollups
  • Employee performance view
  • Share Today's Brief to WhatsApp (text or PDF)
  • Unified design system (DM Serif + DM Sans, navy & gold)
  • Plain-language labels (no more developer jargon)
  • Time-aware greeting with owner name
  • Restore-from-snapshot one-tap helper
